title: AgriTech Buyer Discovery
description: Find international B2B buyers for agricultural export commodities like essential oils, spices, and organic products.

commodities.title: Commodities to Search
commodities.description: List of products to search for buyers

buyerCountries.title: Buyer Countries (leave empty for all)
buyerCountries.description: Only show leads from these countries. Leave empty to show all countries. Example: United States, Germany, Japan, United Kingdom, France

maxPages.title: Max Pages per Search
maxPages.description: Maximum number of result pages to scrape per commodity per platform

minOrderQuantityKg.title: Minimum Order Quantity (kg)
minOrderQuantityKg.description: Filter out leads below this quantity. Set to 0 to include all.

maxLeadAgeDays.title: Maximum Lead Age (days)
maxLeadAgeDays.description: Only include leads posted within this many days

debugMode.title: Debug Mode
debugMode.description: Save raw HTML from each page to Key-Value Store for troubleshooting

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Configure proxy settings. Use RESIDENTIAL for best results.
